name: Where are the flowers? 🌼
description:
Bot to find the flowers for the event.

Day one: 🌼 Today's bloom awaits where events come alive...

Found on the event page!!

Day two: 🌷 Today's bloom hides where new stories are born...

Found at the bottom of the "Create a Character" page!!

Day three: 🪻Today's bloom rests where the rules of the garden are written...

Found in community guidelines!

Day four: 🌹Today's bloom is tucked where your name is set in stone...

Found on the settings page!

Day five: 🌺 Today's bloom hides where your personas take shape...

Found on "My personas"!

Day six: 🪷Today's bloom is hiding where your stories begin...

Found on "My Chats"!

[Personally, it appeared at the end of all my chats.]

Day seven: 🌻The final bloom awaits where scripts come to life...

Found on "Scripts beta"!

Well, the seven days are over! I hope this has been helpful 🙂‍↕️. I really appreciate your comments! 💖 Enjoy!
creator: Aegle_Hua
